title: Robust Mediterranean Minari Skewers
description: A flavorful and energizing Mediterranean dish featuring minari, this recipe is perfect for a light and refreshing meal. The combination of marinated minari, vegetables, and spices creates a truly robust flavor profile.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper to make the marinade.
Add the minari, red onion, and red bell pepper to the marinade and toss to coat.
Thread the marinated minari and vegetables onto skewers.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
Warm the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it on the grill for 2-3 minutes.
Serve the skewers with warm pita bread and enjoy.
Garnish with additional minari and lemon wedges, if desired.
